report.name: Basic Office Reorganization - Initial Stakeholder Identification Attempt

highlightsData.title: Limited Stakeholder Identification and Mapping
highlightsData.description:
Incomplete Stakeholder Analysis: Basic stakeholder identification limited to immediate contacts without systematic mapping of influence, interests, or impact relationships. Missing key stakeholders including decision makers and affected parties.

No Power-Interest Assessment: Lack of stakeholder influence and interest analysis resulting in unclear engagement priorities and potential resistance points remaining unidentified and unaddressed.

highlightsData.title: Absence of Systematic Engagement Strategy
highlightsData.description:
No Communication Planning: Lack of stakeholder communication strategy with no planned touchpoints, information sharing, or feedback collection mechanisms resulting in limited awareness and potential resistance.

Informal Approach Limitations: Informal stakeholder management approach without structured engagement, documentation, or relationship tracking limiting effectiveness and scalability of improvement efforts.

highlightsData.title: Missing Change Management Foundation
highlightsData.description:
No Change Leadership: Absence of identified change champions or leadership support limiting change momentum and organizational alignment for even basic improvement initiatives.

Risk Assessment Gap: No stakeholder-related risk assessment or mitigation planning potentially exposing improvement efforts to unexpected resistance or implementation barriers.

actionItems.title: Provide Fundamental Stakeholder Analysis Training
actionItems.description: Deliver basic training on stakeholder identification, mapping, influence assessment, and engagement planning to build foundational stakeholder management capabilities.

attachments.name: stakeholder_analysis_training.jpg
attachments.description: Fundamental stakeholder analysis training with mapping and engagement planning techniques

actionItems.title: Conduct Comprehensive Stakeholder Identification Workshop
actionItems.description: Facilitate stakeholder identification workshop to systematically map all affected parties, decision makers, influencers, and support resources for complete stakeholder landscape understanding.

actionItems.title: Develop Basic Communication and Engagement Plan
actionItems.description: Create simple stakeholder communication plan with information sharing protocols, feedback collection methods, and regular touchpoint scheduling for systematic engagement approach.

actionItems.title: Establish Change Leadership and Support Structure
actionItems.description: Identify and engage change champions and leadership support to provide organizational backing, resource allocation, and change momentum for improvement initiatives.

actionItems.title: Restart Initiative with Proper Stakeholder Foundation
actionItems.description: Restart improvement initiative using systematic stakeholder analysis, engagement planning, and change management approach to ensure sustainable success and organizational support.
